body.title: Fix WINNOW trigger extraction — learning from wrong signal
body.result: D357: stripped think_context from keyword extraction. Cleaned 267 dead WINNOW nodes. New WINNOWs will learn from actual user input.
body.description: 267 WINNOW habits exist, 100% have 0 activations. Root cause: _deposit_winnow_breadcrumb() in reasoners/base.py (HIGH inertia) extracts keywords from think_context, not user input. Triggers like [think_context intent=general] never match actual user messages. Fix: extract keywords from core_input (stripped of thread context) instead. This is the graph learning the wrong thing — fixing it means the graph starts learning useful patterns from every conversation turn.
